ab: ta 2022 a cavilj napakaigi a sihu ta maqatianga sepapuvecik a tja ngadan a kinacalisian a pitua tja mibunsiu.
ch: 在2022年，政府召開了原住民身分證可單列族名的會議。
en: In 2022, the government announced that indigenous identification cards can include tribal names separately.

ab: nakisusu aken tua kisamuljamulja a kiqaunga tua sihu ta sepapuvecik a tja ngadan a kinacalisian a pitua tja mibunsiu a tja maqacuvucuvung i qinaljan a ti Puljaljuan.
ch: 我訪問了長期向政府爭取身分證「單列族名」的部落青年Puljaljuyan。
en: I interviewed Puljaljuyan, a young tribal member who has long been advocating for the inclusion of tribal names on identification cards.

ab: na mare kicun anga men ta nu tucu a pulavalavay vaik amen a sema ta umaq nimadju a maljavaljavar
ch: 我和他約定好這個假日到他家訪問他。
en: We had arranged to visit his home this holiday for the interview.

ab: ta maljavaljavar amen pasemalavan aken ta kinasizuanan nua ngadan nimadju, sa na pakeljangi tua sikatacemekeljan nimadju katua qinaljan nimadju.
ch: 在訪問的過程中，他告訴我他的名字的由來，也帶我認識了他的家人、他的部落。
en: During the interview, he introduced to me the origin of his name and also introduced me to his family and tribe.

ab: ku kivadaqan timadju tu anema sikipatjemacay ta pavalit tua ngadan,a inika nanguaq a kakudan a sikipuvecikan a pasusangas?
ch: 我問他為什麼堅持要改名，舊的登記方式不好嗎?
en: I asked him why he insisted on changing his name. Wasn’t the old registration method sufficient?

ab: qivu timadju tjanuaken a mayatucu, “ayatua a tjiniukukuan inika maqati a mapasalusu a siqivuan tua ngadan nimadju, tjuruvu a caucau a ti Pu sinseng aya tjaimadju, sa napenepedjeli aravac.”
ch: 他對我說，因為用中文字並不能準確的傳達他的名字，其他人還會叫他「Pu先生」，也因此鬧出不少笑話。
en: He told me that using Chinese characters could not accurately convey his name, and others would still call him \"Pu Xian Sheng,\" which resulted in many jokes being made.

ab: qivu ti Puljaljuyan, “a tja ngadan a vincikan tua tjavecik avanazua tja kangadanan,a ku ngadan sinipupatarevan ta ku qinaljan ku kinacemekeljan ta ku nasi,ulja napatja tjuruvu a caucau a pacikel tua tjaratja ngadangadan.”
ch: Puljaljuyan說：「原住民語書寫的名字才是我們真正的名字。我的名字代表了我們的族群、我們的家族、我們的身分，希望能有更多族人找回自己的名字。」
en: Puljaljuyan said, \"The names written in indigenous languages are our true names. My name represents our ethnic group, our family, our identity. I hope more fellow tribespeople can reclaim their own names.\"
